description.zh-Hans: 应用以可配置点为中心的径向模糊（缩放模糊）效果。对每个像素沿从中心向外的径向线进行采样。
description.en: Applies radial blur (zoom blur) centered at a configurable point. Samples along radial lines from the center outward for each pixel.

triggers.zh-Hans: 径向模糊, 中心模糊, 缩放模糊, 放射模糊
triggers.en: radial blur, center blur, zoom blur, radial motion blur

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 从图像中心向外应用径向模糊，创建速度感。
exampleUsage.en: Apply radial blur outward from the center of an image to create a sense of speed.
